retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete, then destroy. (DAS keeps for 7 yrs) ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete, (Save inactive documents in electronic folder) then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
